title: fixture baseline process succeeds but Attempt is failed
preconditions: CPU fixture generated and Baseline adapter declares outputs/b_dev_metrics.json
reproduction: 运行 Baseline B_dev/B_test 并轮询 Worker
expected: 退出码 0 且 Attempt 完成并解析 metrics
actual: 两个 Attempt 失败为 RUN_EXPECTED_OUTPUT_MISSING
root_cause: metrics_output 与 Worker attempt artifact 校验根目录不一致；fixture 未使用 AUTOAD_ATTEMPT_DIR
regression_tests: tests/test_baseline_control.py; fixture oracle; isolated Baseline probe
generalization_invariant: expected_outputs 必须是 attempt-relative 且程序应写入 Worker 注入的 artifact 根

title: missing guardrail could be reported as improvement
preconditions: contract contains primary and guardrail; comparable identities and implementation evidence valid
actual: 缺少任一合同 metric 时应 INCONCLUSIVE
status: scientific_effect 只对 primary 设缺失门禁，其他 metric 被静默省略
column18: Improvement requires complete finite numeric values for every EvaluationContract metric

title: unsupported split argv shape is silently transformed
reproduction: 对 equals_form 与 ambiguous_two_slots 构造 plan
actual: equals_form becomes --split value only; ambiguous shape replaces first slot
root_cause: plain index field did not require empty unique value slot
generalization_invariant: typed binding must be explicit and unique; unknown shapes fail closed

title: network response loss causes duplicate request id
preconditions: report is readable and discussion is enabled
reproduction: POST discussion then abort response and retry same question
expected: repeat must reuse same durable request id and clear after successful reconciliation
actual: frontend discarded retry record for all non-429 errors
regression_tests: client retry state is retained until server confirms completion
